L1_headline: + HOLX – Nanaz Mohtashami acquired 3,190 restricted stock units. | 02/26/2026
L2_brief: Director Nanaz Mohtashami acquired 3,190 restricted stock units (RSUs) in Hologic Inc on 02/26/2026. The RSUs vest on the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders and settle one-for-one into shares of common stock. Following the transaction, Mohtashami holds 7,371 shares of common stock directly.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a grant of restricted stock units as part of director compensation, vesting at the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. No price was reported for the transaction, consistent with a compensation award rather than an open-market purchase. Prior to the grant, Mohtashami held approximately 4,181 shares directly.
risks_flagged: Transaction is a director compensation RSU grant, not a discretionary open-market transaction
